name: concord
description: A bundle of Claude Code harness-engineering tools. Currently: a per-session state checkpoint, a cross-session task charter (north-star framing + merged decisions), and a cross-session review-and-fix convergence loop that iterates a change through review gates until it ends on a real executable anchor. State is persisted from the transcript and re-injected on resume, compaction, or a fresh session. Grows with more harness capabilities.
